overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through downtown Los Santos at night. The character moves along sidewalks past pedestrians and storefronts, then crosses a busy intersection with neon billboards and traffic. The scene features detailed urban architecture with palm trees, stone buildings, and vintage cars.

character passes a pedestrian in tan clothing walking in the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city sidewalk at night, passing a news stand and stone buildings. A pedestrian is seen crouching near the news stand, and various other pedestrians walk by. The street is lined with trees and parked cars, with a large commercial building visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk approaching major intersection with neon signage

events.description: ground surface changes from grey stone tiles to red brick pavement
vintage green car drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward the busy intersection with bright neon billboards ahead

notable_agents.action: vintage green car driving along the street
pedestrian in dark clothing walking alongside ego

entered.detail: classic enclosed telephone booth with glass panels and PHONE signage
tall palm trees visible across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the sidewalk changes to red brick pavement. A phone booth appears on the left, and the large commercial building with bright pink neon signage becomes prominent ahead. Traffic increases with a vintage green car passing by, and palm trees become visible across the approaching intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with crosswalks and neon signage

events.description: traffic light changes to green, pedestrians begin crossing the street
character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the wide intersection
character reaches the opposite sidewalk and pauses to observe surroundings

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk corner with other pedestrians, then crossing the street and looking around upon reaching the other side

notable_agents.action: man in green shirt and cap waiting at corner then crossing alongside ego
man in brown jacket crossing the street holding a newspaper

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
tall ornate street lamp illuminating the corner
building with rounded corner and large glass windows

segments.scene_description: The character waits at the busy intersection corner with other pedestrians as cars pass by. When the light changes, the character crosses the wide street with a group, passing through the crosswalk lines. Upon reaching the opposite side, the character pauses to look around at the surrounding buildings and traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nighttime city district that transitions from a quiet sidewalk into a vibrant, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins with the character walking past stone buildings and a newsstand where a pedestrian crouches, moving alongside a street lined with trees and parked cars. As the character continues, the pavement shifts to red brick and a phone booth appears, while a large commercial building with bright pink neon signage looms ahead and a vintage green car passes by. The scene then opens up at a busy intersection where the character waits with other pedestrians before crossing the wide street through the white crosswalk lines. Finally, the camera pauses on the opposite side of the road, looking back at the surrounding architecture and the flow of city traffic.
